audit_items.proof_trace: In the error path at L682-686 of createMetazoneMappings, when the UVector constructor sets a failure status, line 684 calls deleteOlsonToMetaMappingEntry(entry) which internally calls uprv_free(entry), then line 685 immediately calls uprv_free(entry) again — a confirmed double-free. The entry has not yet been inserted into mzMappings (addElement at L690 is unreached), so no other path would free it.
audit_items.attack_scenario: An attacker who can induce memory pressure causing the UVector internal allocation to fail will trigger this error path via getMetazoneID → getMetazoneMappings → createMetazoneMappings, achieving a double-free that enables heap corruption and potential arbitrary code execution.
